# Cloister

> Compliant, encrypted-UTXO shielded pool for EVM chains. A privacy layer for payments:
> a payer settles without revealing the on-chain payer↔recipient link, while proving in
> zero knowledge that the funds belong to a compliance good-set (ASP). Standalone DFX
> product; OpenCryptoPay is the first integration. Self-built on gnark (Apache-2), no GPL.

## Facts

- ZK: Groth16 over BN254, Poseidon2 hash, 2-in/2-out circuit, 50,481 R1CS constraints.
- Prove time: ~190–220 ms (gnark, desktop) vs ~1.78 s (old circom/snarkjs WebView) ≈ 8×.
- Note: curve-free, pubKey = H(privKey); commitment = H(amount, pubKey, blinding);
  nullifier = H(commitment, leafIndex, H(privKey, commitment, leafIndex)).
- Merkle: fixed depth 20 (2^20 ≈ 1.05M notes), empty leaf 0, node H(l,r), off-chain insertion.
- Public signals (order): Root, PublicAmount, ExtDataHash, InputNullifier[2],
  OutputCommitment[2], NewRoot, PairIndex, AssociationRoot.
- Proving runs on-device (native gomobile module); the witness never leaves the device.
- Relayer is broadcast-only (sees the proof, never the witness).
- Licensing: product code proprietary (DFX AG); deps Apache-2/MIT/BSD/Unlicense only.

## Components

- packages/prover-gnark: ZK layer (zk/), prover lib (prover/), gomobile binding (mobile/),
  cmd/setup (keys+verifier), cmd/proverd (dev HTTP prover). Go, gnark.
- packages/contracts: ShieldedPool.sol, Groth16Verifier.sol (MIT), TransactionVerifier.sol
  (a,b,c adapter), PoolRegistry.sol. Solidity 0.8.20, OpenZeppelin.
- packages/sdk: keys, notes, merkle tree, note encryption (nacl + view tags), buildWitness,
  pluggable backend (backend.js), submit.js (idempotent fallback), sync.js (indexer→chain).
- packages/api: broadcast-only relayer. packages/indexer: commitment/discovery service.
- dfx-wallet/modules/cloister-prover: native Expo module wrapping Cloister.xcframework.

## Docs

- [Architecture](ARCHITECTURE.md): system, components, lifecycle, design decisions.
- [Circuit](CIRCUIT.md): primitives, public signals, constraints, soundness, setup.
- [Security](SECURITY.md): threat model, contract/circuit/relayer controls, residual risks.
- [Privacy](PRIVACY.md): what's hidden/revealed, proving location, trust boundaries.
- [Fallbacks](FALLBACKS.md): proving + submission + sync fallback chains, idempotency.
- [Integration](INTEGRATION.md): native module, SDK wiring, build/prove/submit, deploy.
- [Validation](VALIDATION.md): test suites, 1000-tx soak, adversarial battery, results.

## Build / test

- go test ./... (in packages/prover-gnark): primitives, circuit, prover, mobile.
- npx hardhat test (in packages/contracts): contract + real-proof E2E.
- node test/e2e-native.mjs (in packages/sdk, with proverd): SDK↔circuit consistency.
- node soak/soak.mjs 1000 + node soak/adversarial.mjs (local hardhat + proverd).

## Caveats

- Trusted setup is a single groth16.Setup run; mainnet needs a multi-party Phase-2 ceremony.
- proverd sees the witness → dev/CI only, never production.
- ASP good-set is a policy/operational trust; owner/guardian/ASP must be multisig+timelock.
- Independent external audit required before handling real value.
